items.title: Keep classic and modern as skins over one live app
System Doctor diagnostics in the live app
items.notes: Dock doctor exists and probes core services.

items.title: Delivery ledger tied to the real thread scope
items.notes: Being expanded from the old Missing 20 list.

items.title: Real mini-app surface instead of card-only popups
items.notes: Architecture, memory, inbox, datasets, reports, boards, alerts, cases, assets, labs, files, phrases, swarms, suggestions, god-rays, assist link converted.

items.title: True PS5-style 2026 menu flow across the whole celestial universe
items.notes: Current state is partial and not fully game-menu-grade.

items.title: Full planet -> moon -> meteorite -> satellite -> dust progression for every branch
items.notes: Needs stronger consistency and drill rules.

items.title: Map real repo features, docs, tools and services into the celestial hierarchy
Order top-level planets by convenience and importance near the center
Make explore camera mode usable with the full universe visible at once
Render the same hierarchy correctly across all camera modes
items.notes: User reported mode mismatch and broken toggles.

items.title: Batch and lazy load the universe like a 2026 game menu
items.notes: Avoid startup overload and reduce GPU churn.

items.title: Fully usable space dust system for tiny repo records
items.notes: Needed for docs, knowledge and file-level records.

items.title: Fast file-moon and dust paging for very large repo counts
Map feature labels to closest real GLB instead of one fallback orb
items.notes: User asked for full GLB assignment.

items.title: Readable labels above each celestial body except dust
Correct scaling and spacing for celestial bodies
items.notes: User reported bunching and impossible navigation.

Console-style focus, enter and back flow for celestial navigation

Break up Underworld backend work into safer batches
items.notes: User said Underworld is smashing the system.

items.title: Perfect lower-tier batching and loading before 70B work
Stop batch runners from destroying VRAM on Hostinger and Vast

items.title: Create disposable GPU instances for heavier LLM workloads when they actually arise
Fix public app CORS allowlist for app.projectsolar.cloud

Handoff long tasks from chat into Live Tasks with resume path
Prevent agent chat endpoint from blocking the backend event loop
Recoup files to Hostinger before GPU destroy
Full mobile, tablet and desktop symmetry and placement QA

items.title: Production smoke tests after deploy across breakpoints
Never call unfinished work production-complete again
items.notes: Trust repair requirement from this thread.
